// purpose: Emitting build config for the shipped `mcp-gen` binary. Distinct from the root tsconfig.json, which is a noEmit typecheck config (module ESNext / Bundler). This one emits runnable CommonJS into dist/ so the tool runs as plain `node dist/...` with no tsx. ts-morph + typescript stay runtime dependencies (the tool invokes the checker at runtime); they are required, not bundled away.
